name: Caramel Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy skillet, brown 2 cups sugar, stirring constantly until caramelized, being careful not to scorch it.
2. Immediately combine eggs, remaining sugar, flour, and milk in a large saucepan. Smooth out any lumps and bring to a boil.
3. Carefully add the caramelized sugar and stir constantly until the mixture is melted. Remove from the heat; add vanilla.
4. Pour into the cylinder of an ice cream freezer, adding enough whipping cream to fill it 3/4 full.
5. Freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
Yield: 1 gallon
